name: Beef & Corn Pie
recipeIngredient: 8 3/4 oz Can whole kernel corn, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees.
2. Cook ground beef and onion in a 10-inch skillet over medium heat until the beef is brown, stirring occasionally; drain excess fat.
3. Stir in corn, tomato sauce, bell pepper, basil, oregano, salt, and red pepper sauce.
4. Prepare the crust: In a medium bowl, mix flour, cornmeal, and salt. Add butter and enough water to form a soft dough.
5. Press the crust firmly onto the bottom and sides of an ungreased pie plate.
6. Spoon the beef mixture into the pie plate.
7. Bake at 400 degrees for 25 minutes.
8. Sprinkle with shredded cheddar cheese.
9. Continue baking until the cheese is melted, about 5 more minutes.
10. Let stand for 10 minutes before cutting.
